queries.question: Provide a list of all saving accounts combined with a list of checking accounts with an interest rate of 1%.
queries.sql:
SELECT Savings_Accounts.AccountNumber
FROM Savings_Accounts
UNION
SELECT Checking_Accounts.AccountNumber
FROM Checking_Accounts
WHERE Checking_Accounts.Interest_Rate = "1%"

queries.question: Which saving accounts have an interest rate of 1% and which checking accounts have the same interest rate?
queries.sql:
SELECT Savings_Accounts.AccountNumber
FROM Savings_Accounts
WHERE Savings_Accounts.Interest_Rate = "1%"
UNION
SELECT Checking_Accounts.AccountNumber
FROM Checking_Accounts
WHERE Checking_Accounts.Interest_Rate = "1%"

ambiguous_dsl.question: List saving accounts and checking accounts with an interest rate of 1%.
